Video.summary: Live from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025, this fierce "Commonwealth Clash" features Virginia Tech taking on their in-state rivals, the University of Virginia (UVA). This pivotal pool play match is part of the fourth regional of the season, with teams vying for crucial seeding and a bid to the National Championship.The episode showcases intense action, starting with Women's Doubles, where UVA's Armelle Worrell and Mia Kim face off against Virginia Tech's Amelia Gaze and Heather Murphy. Later, watch the high-stakes Men's Singles match between Virginia Tech's Cody Miller, known for his reach and strategic placement, and UVA's Braden Cizek, who fights to keep his team in the series. With Virginia Tech leading 3-1 entering the singles match, every point counts.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Virginia Tech vs. UVA

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Virginia Tech vs. UVA
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Virginia Tech vs. UVA
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Virginia Tech vs. UVA

Video.summary: Alix Truong and Megan Fudge take on Parris Todd and Yana Newell in this Women's Pro Doubles Match.

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal

Video.summary: Marcello Jardim and Marco Osorio go head-to-head in the Gold Medal Match of the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships. With power, precision, and nonstop intensity, this Menĺs Pro Singles final showcases top-tier talent and a dramatic battle for the championship title.
Video.title: US Open 2024 ľ Menĺs Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal Match ľ Jardim vs Osorio

Image.alt: US Open 2024 ľ Menĺs Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal Match ľ Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 ľ Menĺs Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal Match ľ Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 ľ Menĺs Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal Match ľ Jardim vs Osorio

Video.summary: Watch a thrilling Mixed Pro Doubles pickleball match between the top-seeded team of Megan Fudge and Jack Munro against Peichuan Kao and Ryler DeHeart. Megan Fudge is a highly-ranked professional player who previously played tennis at the University of Illinois, where she met her husband and partner, Ryler DeHeart. DeHeart is a former professional tennis player who is left-handed. Their opponents are Peichuan Kao, a professional pickleball player who won gold at the APP Fort Lauderdale Open, and Jack Munro, a young pro who was the youngest to become a professional at age 12.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro

Video.summary: At the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, Tina Pisnik and Tammy Emmrich square off against Alix Truong and Milan Rane in the Womenĺs Pro Doubles Bronze Medal match. Expect aggressive shot-making, quick court coverage, and intense chemistry on both sides as these athletes leave it all on the court.
Video.title: US Open 2023 ľ Womenĺs Pro Doubles Bronze Medal ľ Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich

Image.alt: US Open 2023 ľ Womenĺs Pro Doubles Bronze Medal ľ Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich
US Open 2023 ľ Womenĺs Pro Doubles Bronze Medal ľ Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich
US Open 2023 ľ Womenĺs Pro Doubles Bronze Medal ľ Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich

Video.summary: Watch the opening tie of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) from the CCI Brabourne Stadium! The action features Men's Singles between American Champion Brandon Lane (Mumbai) and Polish #1 Mathias Matysik (Pune), followed by Women's Doubles (Katie Morris & Glauca Lane) and Men's Doubles where Vansh Kapadia and his partner secure Pune's first match win. Experience high-stakes professional pickleball where every point counts for the WPBL semi-finals.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1

Video.summary: Welcome to Week 1, Day 1 of the NCPA Indiana Regional 2025, live from The Pickler in Noblesville. This crucial Collegiate Team Match features the University of Wisconsin Madison battling a developing Purdue University squad. This match is pool play for seeding, with teams competing for one of eight bids to the National Championship and a share of the $5,000 prize money.
Video.title: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Team Match - University of Wisconsin Madison vs. Purdue University

Image.alt: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Team Match - University of Wisconsin Madison vs. Purdue University
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Team Match - University of Wisconsin Madison vs. Purdue University
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Team Match - University of Wisconsin Madison vs. Purdue University

Video.summary: Catch the collegiate pickleball excitement from Week 2, Day 2 of the NCPA Utah Regional 2025. This intense team match features Utah Tech taking on Utah State as they compete for a national bid to the National Championship in St. Louis, Missouri.The episode features commentary on the exploding growth of college pickleball with college legend and Yola's College Relationship Manager, Timber Tucker. Watch key matchups in men's doubles, women's singles, and the deciding mixed doubles games. Key players include Gavin Fowler (singles 5.2 rating) , Brinley Horton , and Bo Cavell from Utah Tech, as well as standout players Olivia and Brady.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

NCPA Round of 16: UW vs. FSU
NCPA Round of 16: UW vs. FSU

Video.summary: Day 7 of the World Pickleball League brings a critical and dramatic game between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Bengaluru Jawans. The game begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match featuring Mumbai's American star Brandon Lane against Bengaluru's Jack Foster. The match lives up to the hype, showcasing fierce action.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Video.summary: The high-voltage group stage of the World Pickleball League (WPL) nears its end on Day 8 with a crucial tie between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Chennai Super Champs. The commentary team sets the stage for a tense match, which is determined by an incredibly close final scoreline and points difference, with all six teams still in the running for the four semi-final spots. Also witness the Exhibition Match of the Century featuring Bollywood superstars Aamir Ali (Team Aamir) and Ali Fazal (Team Ali), live from the CCI Brabourne Stadium.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match

Video.summary: In this US Open semifinal showdown, top seeds Kyle Yates and Andrei Daescu face off against the dynamic duo of Austin Gridley and Mario Barrientos. With strategic finesse and explosive play, both teams battle for a spot in the final. A must-watch clash of styles and strengths on Championship Court.
Video.title: US Open 2023 ľ Menĺs Pro Doubles Semifinal ľ Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos

Image.alt: US Open 2023 ľ Menĺs Pro Doubles Semifinal ľ Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos
US Open 2023 ľ Menĺs Pro Doubles Semifinal ľ Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos
US Open 2023 ľ Menĺs Pro Doubles Semifinal ľ Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos

Video.summary: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, hosts the high-stakes Women's Doubles Open Final featuring Team England against Team Spain. Defending champions Spain, represented by the powerhouse duo of Sabrina Mendez and Glauka Carvajal, look to secure their second consecutive title against the English pair of Thaddea Lock and Katy Morris.
Video.title: Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal

Image.alt: Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal
Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal
Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal
